tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: The old castle _________ (build) in the 12th century and _________ (visit) by thousands of tourists every year.
We _________ (tell) to wait outside, but nobody _________ (explain) why the meeting had been postponed.
My laptop _________ (repair) right now, so I _________ (lend) one by my classmate until it is ready.
She _________ (have / her hair / cut) last Saturday and then _________ (have / her photo / take) for the school yearbook.
The new sports hall _________ (open) by the mayor next month, and a special ceremony _________ (already / plan).
answer: will be ('ll be) opened, is going to be opened

items.context: He _________ (not / allow) to enter the competition because his entry form _________ (not / submit) on time.
